song_name: Something Happened On The Way To Heaven

versions.song_name: Something Happened On The Way To Heaven
Something Happened On The Way To Heaven

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: These are all basic chords if you use a capo on the first fret.

content:
Phil Collins - Something Happened on the Way to Heaven
From the album ...But Seriously released in 1989
Standard Tuning
*Capo on the 1st fret*

[Intro] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]F#[/ch]
        [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]F#[/ch]

[Verse1] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch] x4
[tab][ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
  We had a life, we had a love,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
  But you don't know what you've got 'til you lose it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
  Well that was then and this is now[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
  And I want you back[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
How many times can I say I'm sor--ry (how many times)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
Yes I'm sor--ry[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
  How can something so good go so bad[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
  How can something so right go so wrong[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]   
  But I don't know, I don't have all the answers[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
  But I want you back[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
How many times can I say I'm sor--ry (how many times)[/tab]

Well you know...

[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
  You can run, and you can hide[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
  But I'm not leaving less you come with me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
  We've had our problems but I'm on your side[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
You're all I need, please believe in  me [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
            Oh yeah[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
  I only wanted someone to love[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
  But something happened on the way to heaven[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
  It got a hold of me and wouldn't let go[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch] 
  And I want you back[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
How many times can I say I'm sor--ry  (how many times)[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
Oh yes I'm sor--ry (sor--ry)[/tab]

Well you know...

[Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
  You can run, and you can hide[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
But I'm not leaving less you come with me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
  We've had our problems but I'm on your side[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch] 
You're all I need, please believe me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
  You can run, and you can hide[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
But I'm not leaving 'til it's all over[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
  We've had our problems but I'm on your side[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
You're all I need, let me show you[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]F#[/ch]
    They say you can't take it with you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
When you go[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
And I believe it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]F#[/ch]
     But taking what I've got or being[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
Here with you, you know[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
I'd, I'd rather  leave it[/tab]

[Intro] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]F#[/ch]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]F#[/ch]
Verse 4:[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
  We had a life, we had a love,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
  But you don't know what you've got 'til you lose it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
  Well that was then and this is now[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
  And I want you back[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
How many times can I say I'm sor--ry (how many times)[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch] 
Oh yes I'm sor--ry (Yes, I'm sorry) Well you know...[/tab]

[Chorus final]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
  You can run, and you can hide[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
But I'm not leaving less you come with me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
  We've had our problems but I'm on your side[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch] 
You're all I need, please believe me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
  You can run, and you can hide[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
But I'm not leaving 'til it's all over[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
  We've had our problems but I'm on your side[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [fade out with Chorus chords]
You're all I need, please believe in  me[/tab]
